assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated IFRS financial statements.
The referenced intragroup dividends receivable gives rise to foreign currency risk within the scope of IFRS 9 hedge accounting guidance.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities exposed to changes in fair value attributable to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model for exposure to variability in cash flows of recognised items or highly probable forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
